description: Main-window-only grants (trmx-74): core:window:allow-close lets the tab manager close the window when the last tab closes. Scoped to main so the settings window gains no close-by-script surface it does not need. trmx-145 adds clipboard-manager:allow-write-text — WRITE-ONLY (no read grant, matching the OSC 52 write-only stance) and main-only, so terminal copies reach the native pasteboard while the settings window gains no clipboard surface at all.
